frontMatter.title: Android Arch's Room - Introduction
frontMatter.summary: My first reaction when Android Architecture Component is out is just **meh..** I mean come on, the ViewModel is heavily tied to Activity and Fragment and basically i don't need it because i use Conductor…

prev.title: Redux-Like State Management with Sealed Class in Kotlin
prev.summary: On the previous post, we already discussed how your view should have its own model. We also have discussed how you can make a simple redux-like state machine in Kotlin.

next.title: Android Arch's Room - Getting Started
next.summary: So, on the first post we already have an introduction or more like a sneak peek to Room data access object code. Let's get our hands dirty now!
